pages.title: Obby: Pump Up Your Muscles! 1 per second
pages.description:
Navigate complex obstacle courses with precise timing to build up strength in this casual challenge. The game tasks players with rapid muscle inflation mechanics, requiring quick actions to overcome dynamic barriers. Progressing through increasingly difficult stages tests reflexes as players race against the clock to pump up their muscles faster than one per second.

Key Features

• Rapid muscle inflation mechanic  
• Obstacle avoidance timing  
• Increasing stage difficulty  
• Time-based progression challenge  
• Colorful casual game environment

pages.title: Obby Escape from Tsunami Brainrot

• Precision jump and climb gameplay

• Progressive level difficulty scaling  
• Timed escape challenge mode
